rationale: By inspection, the three migrate-layout fixes address the round-1 asks without weakening the default safety posture. Fix 1 still blocks unmerged pre-flatten refs by default; allowlist is scoped, and --force is explicit and emits a named WARN before proceeding. Remote-default exclusion is limited to the branch treated as an alternate landing/default branch, not a broad skip. Fix 2 now scans all repo-root Markdown plus flat .mindspec/context-map.md and moved roots, while remaining repo-root-only for the widened sweep, so frozen snapshots are not pulled into the 404 gate. Fix 3 detects non-terminal run state before the fresh-run clean-tree precondition, so dirty rewrite-crash recovery can resume; fresh runs still require clean tree, and abort/post-publish refusal remains routed through rollback. I did not run tests per instructions; CI green is treated as test authority.
